summary: Phase 3 regression for help-agent + brand-icons + mascot. 15/15 backend tests PASS (tours list, tour detail, 404, sessions CRUD/state machine, ask intent suggestion, /api/health, /api/pace, /api/exception-review, brand-icon static assets). Frontend Playwright fully validates EchoHelpMascot (button, panel, 5 tours, tour-view with step counter + advance/skip, chat ask flow with suggested tour) and sidebar brand-icon wiring (16 brand-icon imgs loaded with naturalWidth>0 after expanding 4 groups, threshold was 10).

issues: EchoHelpMascot 36x36 button at (1866,1026) sits very close to the much larger ECHO voice 'CLICK' circle button. Visually crowded but both are clickable and distinct. Optional: consider repositioning or stacking offset for clearer affordance.

critical_code_review_comments: help_agent.py is 312 lines, well under threshold; in-memory sessions dict (sessions = {}) is intentional per request but will not survive backend restart - acceptable for tour UX.
EchoHelpMascot.tsx (454 lines) approaching the 700-line split threshold; consider splitting menu/tour/chat views into sub-components if it grows further.
brand-icon-registry.ts cleanly centralizes 31 mappings + Tier3 mascot (MyEcho.png) and provides a getBrandIcon() helper used in Sidebar; good pattern.
Sidebar fallback to Lucide works: items not in BRAND_ICON_REGISTRY still render via Lucide SVG (visually confirmed in screenshot — Schedule, Tip Audit, My Operations, etc. show non-brand icons).
All 16 sampled brand-icon elements have complete=true and naturalWidth>0 — assets correctly copied to /app/dist/spa/brand-icons/ and served by preview-server.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all assertions: panel_open, tour_view_visible, step_counter_ok, advance_btn, skip_btn, chat_input, ask_reply, suggested_tour_paystub, brand_icon_count=16/loaded=16)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Mascot testids used: echo-help-mascot-button (FAB), echo-help-mascot-panel, mascot-back-btn, mascot-close-btn, mascot-tour-{id}, mascot-tour-view, mascot-tour-advance, mascot-tour-skip, mascot-open-chat, mascot-chat-view, mascot-chat-input, mascot-chat-send, mascot-chat-suggested-{tour_id}. Sidebar group testids use snake-case suffix: culinary_ops, pastry_ops, daily, financial, intelligence, events_catering, hotel_ops, guest_concierge, admin_system, administration, menu_engineering_grp. Brand icons serve correctly at /brand-icons/{tier1,tier1c,tier2,tier3}/*.png via preview-server.mjs. Help-agent endpoints all under /api/help-agent/* with in-memory session store.
